title: thymus serpyllum subsp. fontqueri
intro: Thymus serpyllum subsp. fontqueri, also known as Spanish thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant, characterized by its small, pinkish-purple flowers and compact, bushy growth habit. The medicinal properties of Spanish thyme include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective against various infections and wounds. The health benefits of Spanish thyme include its ability to boost the immune system, relieve stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Spanish thyme can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or tincture, and is often used to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
